workflow.name: Process email invoices with OCR, GPT-4, Slack, QuickBooks and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
## Overview
This workflow automates invoice processing directly from your email inbox.

It captures invoice attachments, extracts structured data using OCR and AI, validates totals, and securely processes invoices. If issues are detected, it routes them for human review. Approved invoices are recorded in QuickBooks and logged for auditing.

---

## How It Works

1. **Email Trigger**
   Monitors a Gmail label and downloads invoice attachments automatically.

2. **Configuration & Metadata**
   Sets OCR API, thresholds, and captures invoice details like vendor, timestamp, and file hash.

3. **File Processing**
   Routes PDFs to a text extractor and images to an OCR API.

4. **AI Data Extraction**
   AI converts raw text into structured invoice data with confidence scores.

5. **Validation**
   Recalculates totals and verifies subtotal, tax, and final amounts.

6. **Data Privacy**
   Masks sensitive fields like PAN, GST, and bank account details.

7. **Review Decision**
   Flags invoices for review if validation fails or confidence is low.

8. **Human Review (if needed)**
   Sends Slack alert and waits for approval before proceeding.

9. **Accounting Integration**
   Creates a bill in QuickBooks for approved invoices.

10. **Audit Logging**
   Stores processing details in Google Sheets for traceability.

11. **Notifications**
   Sends a success message after processing is complete.

---

## Setup Instructions

1. Connect Gmail trigger and configure the invoice label (e.g., "AP Inbox")
2. Add OCR API endpoint in the configuration node
3. Connect OpenAI credentials for data extraction
4. Connect Slack for alerts and notifications
5. Connect QuickBooks for bill creation
6. Add Google Sheets ID for audit logging
7. Configure:
   - Validation tolerance  
   - Confidence threshold  
8. Test with sample invoice emails
9. Activate the workflow

---

## Use Cases

- Automating accounts payable workflows  
- Reducing manual invoice data entry  
- Validating invoices before accounting entry  
- Handling invoice approvals with human-in-the-loop  
- Maintaining audit logs for compliance  

---

## Requirements

- Gmail account (with label setup)
- OpenAI API credentials
- OCR API (e.g., OCR.space or Google Vision)
- Slack workspace
- QuickBooks account
- Google Sheets (for audit logs)
- n8n instance with file handling enabled

---

## Notes

- You can adjust validation tolerance and confidence thresholds based on your needs.
- Extend validation logic in the Code node for stricter financial checks.
- Replace QuickBooks or Google Sheets with your preferred tools if needed.
- Ensure secure handling of sensitive financial data in production environments.

assignments.name: ocrApiUrl
assignments.value: <__PLACEHOLDER_VALUE__OCR API endpoint URL (e.g., OCR.space or Google Vision)__>

options.systemMessage:
You are an invoice data extraction specialist. Extract structured data from the provided invoice text and return it in the exact JSON schema format.

Your task:
1. Extract all invoice header fields (invoice number, date, due date, vendor details)
2. Extract all line items with description, quantity, rate, and amount
3. Extract tax information and totals
4. Flag any fields with low confidence
5. Do NOT perform calculations - only extract what you see
6. Return ONLY the structured JSON output

IMPORTANT: If a field is unclear or missing, set it to null and mark confidence as low.

parameters.content:
## Email Trigger
Watches inbox and downloads invoice attachments automatically.

## Configuration
Stores OCR API, thresholds, Slack channel, and audit sheet settings. and Extracts sender info, timestamp, file hash, and vendor details.

## File Processing
Routes PDF to extractor or images to OCR API for text extraction.

## AI Extraction
AI extracts structured invoice data with confidence scores.

## Validation and Masking
Recalculates totals and checks for mismatches and Masks sensitive data like PAN, GST, and bank details.

## Review Check
Flags invoices needing human review based on validation or confidence.

## Human Review
Sends Slack alert and waits for approval if issues are found.

## Accounting Sync
Creates bill in QuickBooks for approved invoices.

## Audit Logging
Logs processing details and results to Google Sheets.

## How it works
Monitors email for invoice attachments, extracts data using OCR and AI, validates totals, masks sensitive fields, and decides whether to auto-process or send for review.

## Setup
Connect Gmail, OpenAI, OCR API, Slack, QuickBooks, and Google Sheets. Configure thresholds, audit sheet, and test with sample invoices before enabling..

## Notifications
Sends success message after invoice is processed.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
